title: eCommerce & ShowRoom with QR
body:
Website developed in *WordPress*, *WooCommerce* and *Gutenberg*.

Added the utility of showing and/or printing a page with the access QR codes to each of the products to facilitate purchasing in physical spaces, such as the *ShowRoom*.

https://junglemows.com/

> junglemows.com

![](https://xarop.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/junglemows_full.png)
